issue_title: fix: abstain votes should not count against the proposal
issue_body_preview:
### Summary

https://v1.snapshot.box/#/acrossprotocol.eth/proposal/0x97839ddf3cfe90d2a352339d5a6513e66ba074929db992fbf7c05e14c60087e1

It show a wrong message:
 
> Transactions cannot be executed because the Snapshot vote resolved as "against".
test_description_zh: 打开一个包含弃权票(abstain votes)的已结束提案页面，观察提案执行状态的提示信息，检查当提案实际通过时是否正确显示执行状态，而非错误地显示为'against'（反对）状态。
expected_result_zh: 当提案中弃权票不计入反对票时，提案执行状态提示信息应正确反映投票结果，不应错误显示'Transactions cannot be executed because the Snapshot vote resolved as against'，而应正确显示提案通过后的可执行状态或正确的决议结果。
